case_title: WRIGHT, ROBERT vs. SERRANO, EDNA LEAL et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF OCT-05-1993 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF OCT-05-1993 SET ASIDE
